title: Tool's Complement: Create
description: Tool's Complement tools made from create materials.
body:
# Tool's Complement : Create
This mod add a tool/armor set for andesite alloy and brass.

And include andesite alloy/brass variant of the excavator, hammer, knife and sickle from tool's complement.

## don't know what tool's complement is? let me explain what the excavator/hammer/knife/sickle does.

the excavator is a shovel that can mine a 3x3 area.

the hammer is a pickaxe that can mine a 3x3 area.

the knife is a sword like item that can be thrown at enemies.

the sickle can be used to cut an area of grass/tall grass/flowers.

Need a server? check out my partner Kinect Hosting :
